mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile ( user_id, desired_job, desired_industry, education, career, projects, skills, certificates, languages, portfolio_links, resume_text, self_intro, preferences ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{desiredJob}, #{desiredIndustry}, #{education}, #{career}, #{projects}, #{skills}, #{certificates}, #{languages}, #{portfolioLinks}, #{resumeText}, #{selfIntro}, #{preferences} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE desired_job = VALUES(desired_job), desired_industry = VALUES(desired_industry), education = VALUES(education), career = VALUES(career), projects = VALUES(projects), skills = VALUES(skills), certificates = VALUES(certificates), languages = VALUES(languages), portfolio_links = VALUES(portfolio_links), resume_text = VALUES(resume_text), self_intro = VALUES(self_intro), preferences = VALUES(preferences), updated_at = NOW()
